items.name: 🙂Build-a-Gojo : Default Head
items.description:

There are 3 outfits so far (more to come):

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%F0%9F%91%95&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3

There are 3 hairs to use this "Default" head, along with 3 hair outlines to achieve the anime lineart style:

https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=%F0%9F%99%82&Category=1&CreatorName=avatarverse&CreatorType=Group&salesTypeFilter=1&SortType=3
